full_text:
Zhang Yi (Bogong) 張翼 (伯恭)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Yi (張翼), styledBogong (伯恭), was born in Jianwei. Urged Jiang Wei to concentrate on internal affairs. Strict governor, it caused revolt. Zhang Yi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Zhang Yi lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
